task_completion.description: Verify that a patient evaluation or medical record is opened for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should display an active patient evaluation, encounter, or medical record specifically for 'Matt Zenon Betz'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the presenting vitals are correctly documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the clinical evaluation or vitals section, the Heart Rate (HR) field must show '118' and the Systolic Blood Pressure (SBP) field must show '95'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least three distinct anatomical injury diagnoses are recorded using ICD-10 S-codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagnoses, conditions, or injuries list must show at least three distinct ICD-10 codes starting with the letter 'S' (e.g., S01 for scalp laceration, S22 for rib fractures, S72 for femoral fracture).

task_completion.description: Verify that a standard trauma laboratory workup of at least three labs is ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The laboratory requests or orders section must display at least three distinct laboratory tests ordered for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that acute analgesia is prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prescriptions or medication orders section must show an analgesic medication (e.g., morphine, fentanyl, ketorolac, ibuprofen, acetaminophen) prescribed to the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that an orthopedic surgery follow-up appointment is scheduled for 5 to 14 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointments section must show a scheduled appointment for orthopedic surgery, with the appointment date set to 5 to 14 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the GNU Health desktop client menus, forms, and buttons, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not spoof the task using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the genuine GNU Health application window, not a text editor, notepad, or a web browser displaying the prompt.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are genuinely entered into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required vitals, codes, labs, and prescriptions must be visible within the appropriate input fields or saved records of the GNU Health system, not just floating text.
